Project

Brand Commercial Photoshoot

Managed by Rahul Mehta

In Progress

12 May, 2025

28 May, 2025

Rahul Mehta

High-quality product shots for the summer campaign. Focused on clean aesthetics and natural lighting setups. The goal is to align visuals with brand identity.

20 June, 2025

15 August, 2025

ylindustries@gmail.com

13 Tetrick Road, Cypress Gardens, Florida, 33884, US

Website Redesign Proposal

  • Website Redesign & Logo Design for Doe Enterprises to enhance branding and improve user experience.

  • We propose a comprehensive redesign of Acme Corp’s existing website to enhance user experience, modernize branding, and improve conversions. The redesigned site will be responsive, SEO-optimized, and developed using the latest technologies.

    1. Create a modern, responsive UI/UX
    2. Improve load speed & performance
    3. Integrate blog, contact form, and services section
    4. Enable easy CMS-based content updates
Project Timeline :
Milestone
Duration
UI Design & Approval
1 Week
Frontend Development
2 Week
Backend & CMS Integration
1 Week
Final Review & Launch
3 Days
Estimated Total Duration
4 Week

  • Final delivery timeline: 4 weeks from payment receipt.
  • Additional revisions will be charged separately.
